description: Use this API to export the bus location from the active Slider Diagram in the GUI to a file. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0 and 35.1.0. exportbuslocfile_2(buslocfile, exportgeo)

parameters.name: buslocfile
parameters.description: Name of the bus location data file to be written. (input).

parameters.name: exportgeo
parameters.description: Export geophysical coordinates or cartesian coordinates. (input; 1 by default).
